title: pi-dj improvements
description: Pick what to fix before publishing to npm

questions.question: What should we fix/add?
options: 🐛 Windows IPC broken — pause/vol don't work (PowerShell pipe approach is wrong)
⚡ Status bar: 3 shell execs every 3s — slow on RPi/Termux, cache locally instead
🎵 /music command missing — browse local library, gone in last rewrite
📻 Playlist support — /play <youtube playlist URL> queues all tracks
🎨 /viz — terminal visualizer using ffplay spectrum (works on all platforms)
🔍 /search — search without playing, show results list first

questions.question: Windows IPC fix — how to do pause/vol control?
options: Node.js net.createConnection to named pipe (pure Node, no PowerShell, recommended)
Use --input-file flag with a temp script file (no IPC needed, simpler)
Skip pause on Windows entirely, just stop/restart

questions.question: Status bar perf — fix 3 IPC calls per tick?
options: Cache locally: track isPaused ourselves, cache duration on play start, only query time-pos
Batch query: single exec gets all 3 props at once
Leave it, fine on modern hardware
